docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRYVORUKA, IGOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAVIDSON GARAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY KRYVORUKA, IGOR AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON GARAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ALEXANDER BANTOV--RUSSIAN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KRYVORUKA, IGOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED JUL-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON GARAGE
